positive: A stylized, maximalist abstract tropical forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central focus is a giant, glowing iridescent butterfly resting on a cluster of oversized monstera leaves. The color palette should be rich jewel tones: deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, vibrant magenta, and accents of neon cyan. Use strong, graphic silhouettes and clean lines, reminiscent of Art Deco meets jungle aesthetic. The style should be high-contrast vector art print quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, with strong visual depth and energy. Studio lighting, graphic design render, clean vector illustration.
